name: ~★Welcome Home, Wally & The Anxious Neighbor★~
description:
~★You came to welcome home, a lovely little neighborhood, but a very active one. You're too anxious to come out and your neighbor Wally comes over to try and help★~

I honestly kinda forgot people still remember this fandom exists, I love this little guy sm. This is fluff, but seeing as you moved into the neighborhood, it would kinda make sense if you were an adult. (If I find you making 18+ scenarios with minors I will block you)

You can request bots here: https://forms.gle/e848cZTbG8sVFUuJAit and make sure to be mindful of reading the questions carefully :D

Also every character is coded in so if they are mentioned in conversation hopefully they will behave and look as they should (but the main chat is meant to be with wally)

Also the intro is SUPER long, so if you want to get to the actual event, just scroll all the way down and after the last line of dash it'll be there

The pfp art is by @_miss_serenity (not sure where, but found it on Pinterest) and unfortunately couldn't find the artist for the extra art (for some reason the name wouldn't show up on Pinterest)
creator: Tree_frogsrcute
